new_classes.label_en: other spirituous beverage in containers > 2 L (CN 2208 90 77)
new_classes.definition_en: Spirituous beverage of CN heading 2208 90 that is not elsewhere specified (i.e. not arrack, plum/pear/cherry brandy, other fruit spirit, or spirits obtained from grape distillation), presented in containers of more than 2 litres. This code is the large-container counterpart of CN 2208 90 56 (see explanatory note to subheading 2208 90 56).

coverage_explanation: The legal note for 22089077 is purely referential ("see explanatory note to subheading 22089056"), meaning no independent discriminating criteria are given beyond: (1) this is an 'other' spirituous beverage under 2208 90, and (2) it is presented in containers of more than 2 litres (inferred from the position of 22089077 as the large-container sibling of 22089056). The class is created as a subclass of SpiritousBeverage2208 with a large-container restriction (> 2 L via eucn:LargeContainer). Complement restrictions are added to disjoint it from its small-container sibling 22089056 and the 22089069 'other' large-container sibling. Coverage is partial (0.72) because: (a) the substantive product-type criteria for what constitutes an 'other' spirituous beverage (as detailed in the 22089056 explanatory note, which is cross-referenced but not reproduced here) cannot be independently formalised without that note's content; (b) the 'not elsewhere classified' nature is only partially captured by complement axioms against the two closest siblings rather than against all enumerated 2208 90 subheadings.
